title: Carpet crops
description: This resource pack replaces standard crop models with flat, carpet like blocks, utilizing distinct colors to indicate growth stages.
body:
**Carpet crops** is a texture pack made for 1.21.8 - specifically aimed towards farmers in Hypixel Skyblock.

This Resource pack is inspired by [Flat Crops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/flat-crops) by sageuk

**Carpet crops** replaces most of the default crop models with 1-pixel tall "carpets". These smooth textures are much easier on the eyes and help you farm without visual obstruction.

![Farming sunflower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/336635512d6c81d33a7f13f82695601f893ffd89.png)

What does this pack change?
- Crops: Wheat, Carrot, Potato, Nether Wart.
- Flowers: Sunflower, Moonflower, Wild Rose, and Stems.
- Mushrooms: red and brown.
- Cocoa Beans.
